\tzpentry{ID4191}{Pressure Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4191 introduces Pressure Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P(s) \sim s^{-\tau} e^{-s/s_c}, \quad \tau = \frac{3}{2} \end{equation}
